headline: Royal Caribbean Plunges 6% as Oil Shock Torpedoes Cruise Stocks
summary: The cruise sector is getting hit hard today. Royal Caribbean Cruises (NYSE:RCL) is leading the damage among the major operators, with RCL stock falling 6% to less than $270 as of midday Thursday. It is the latest blow in a sector-wide selloff that has been grinding shares lower all week. Oil prices have surged toward ... Royal Caribbean Plunges 6% as Oil Shock Torpedoes Cruise Stocks

headline: Cruise stocks slide as oil surges to $100 on Iran attacks
summary: Investing.com -- Carnival Corporation (NYSE:CCL), Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd (F:RCL), Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd (NYSE:NCLH), and Viking Holdings Ltd (NYSE:VIK) all declined in pre-open trading Thursday as crude oil prices surged near $100 per barrel following fresh Iranian attacks on vessels near the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns about escalating fuel costs across an industry where energy typically accounts for 10%-15% of revenue.

raw.headline: Cruise stocks slide as oil surges to $100 on Iran attacks
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Carnival Corporation (NYSE:CCL), Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd (F:RCL), Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd (NYSE:NCLH), and Viking Holdings Ltd (NYSE:VIK) all declined in pre-open trading Thursday as crude oil prices surged near $100 per barrel following fresh Iranian attacks on vessels near the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns about escalating fuel costs across an industry where energy typically accounts for 10%-15% of revenue.
